name: Claude Notifier Relay
description: Relays the Claude Notifier extension's remoteAudio push (always 127.0.0.1:<port>, hardcoded by the extension) to a target host, so notifications work from inside a dev container without a sidecar container.

port.description: Loopback port to listen on. Must match the claudeNotifier.remoteAudio.port VS Code setting.

targetHost.description: Host to forward connections to, e.g. host.docker.internal, or a centralized relay's hostname on a shared Docker network.
